case_title: KATHLEEN HUMPHREY VS. DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO NOV-19-2008 PER STIPULATION AND ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER KATHLEEN HUMPHREY'S PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. RESPONDENT HAD EVIDENCE BEFORE IT, ON WHICH IT COULD RELY TO CONCLUDE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS THE DRIVER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
